videos.headline: Arizona State scores another defensive TD on backward pass fumble
videos.description: Wyoming's pass is ruled to have been thrown backward, and Arizona State's Justin Wodtly scoops it up and scores a touchdown to add to the Sun Devils' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona State scores another defensive TD on backward pass fumble) 2024/08/31 ESHEET
